yaml.title: Dataset Pipeline
yaml.description: How we built the OpenScore and OLiMPiC training datasets

markdown.markdown:
**Repo:** [`zzsi/openscore`](https://huggingface.co/datasets/zzsi/openscore) on HuggingFace

### Source

The [OpenScore](https://musescore.com/openscore) corpus provides public-domain
MusicXML scores from IMSLP:

| Corpus | Scores | Training pages |
|--------|--------|---------------|
| Lieder | 1,460 | 3,312 |
| Quartets | 122 | 6,274 |
| Orchestra | 94 | 4,870 |
| **Total** | **1,676** | **14,456** |

### Pipeline

```
MusicXML (from OpenScore)
  → LilyPond Docker render → SVG pages
  → SVG bar number extraction → per-page measure ranges
  → music21 slice → per-page MusicXML
  → PNG conversion → (image, MusicXML) pairs
  → HuggingFace push
```

**Implementation:** `datasets/omr/openscore/page_musicxml.py`

### Key details

- **Images**: 835x1181 pixels (LilyPond default DPI)
- **Bar numbers**: Extracted from SVG `<text>` elements with font-size heuristic
- **Pickup bars**: Auto-detected (`measure[0].number == 0`) with offset adjustment
- **Page breaks**: Measures spanning page boundaries assigned to next page

### Known data quality issues

- 3/500 lieder samples have malformed XML (music21 export bugs)
- 7/27,632 lyrics contain non-breaking spaces (`\xa0`)
- See `datasets/omr/openscore/page_musicxml_runs.md` for full run log

## OLiMPiC Dataset

**Repo:** [`zzsi/olimpic`](https://huggingface.co/datasets/zzsi/olimpic) on HuggingFace

System-level piano crops from the [OLiMPiC](https://github.com/ufal/olimpic-icdar24)
dataset (ICDAR 2024):

- **15,014 training samples** (synthetic variant)
- **System-level crops** (~3000x700 pixels) — one grand staff per image
- **Piano only** — no voice staff, but partial lyrics may be visible at top of crop
- **Ground truth**: MusicXML + Linearized MusicXML (LMX)

**Implementation:** `datasets/omr/olimpic/prepare.py`
markdown.srcMarkdownNoYaml:
## OpenScore Dataset

**Repo:** [`zzsi/openscore`](https://huggingface.co/datasets/zzsi/openscore) on HuggingFace

### Source

The [OpenScore](https://musescore.com/openscore) corpus provides public-domain
MusicXML scores from IMSLP:

| Corpus | Scores | Training pages |
|--------|--------|---------------|
| Lieder | 1,460 | 3,312 |
| Quartets | 122 | 6,274 |
| Orchestra | 94 | 4,870 |
| **Total** | **1,676** | **14,456** |

### Pipeline

```
MusicXML (from OpenScore)
  → LilyPond Docker render → SVG pages
  → SVG bar number extraction → per-page measure ranges
  → music21 slice → per-page MusicXML
  → PNG conversion → (image, MusicXML) pairs
  → HuggingFace push
```

**Implementation:** `datasets/omr/openscore/page_musicxml.py`

### Key details

- **Images**: 835x1181 pixels (LilyPond default DPI)
- **Bar numbers**: Extracted from SVG `<text>` elements with font-size heuristic
- **Pickup bars**: Auto-detected (`measure[0].number == 0`) with offset adjustment
- **Page breaks**: Measures spanning page boundaries assigned to next page

### Known data quality issues

- 3/500 lieder samples have malformed XML (music21 export bugs)
- 7/27,632 lyrics contain non-breaking spaces (`\xa0`)
- See `datasets/omr/openscore/page_musicxml_runs.md` for full run log

## OLiMPiC Dataset

**Repo:** [`zzsi/olimpic`](https://huggingface.co/datasets/zzsi/olimpic) on HuggingFace

System-level piano crops from the [OLiMPiC](https://github.com/ufal/olimpic-icdar24)
dataset (ICDAR 2024):

- **15,014 training samples** (synthetic variant)
- **System-level crops** (~3000x700 pixels) — one grand staff per image
- **Piano only** — no voice staff, but partial lyrics may be visible at top of crop
- **Ground truth**: MusicXML + Linearized MusicXML (LMX)

**Implementation:** `datasets/omr/olimpic/prepare.py`
